title: Reverie
description: A Fantasy-based modpack. Explore the world and map out the land!
body:
Reverie is a modpack designed to paint a new world of minecraft for players to explore, re-imagine, and decorate. Adding new biomes, structures, decorations, and other surprises!
### Features:
###
- **Performance** ->(Sodium, Lithium, etc.)
- **Modded Content** ->(Modded Enchants, Decorations, Backpacks, etc.)
- **New Generation** ->(Yung's Structures, Explorify, etc.)
### Recommendations: 
###
- Dramatic Skies by thebaum64 [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dramatic-skys](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dramatic-skys)
- BSL Shaders by CaptTatsu [https://modrinth.com/shader/bsl-shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/bsl-shaders)
- Enchanced Boss Bars by Naku [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enhanced-boss-bars](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enhanced-boss-bars)
- Default Dark Mode by nebulr [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/default-dark-mode](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/default-dark-mode)
- All of their work is high quality and I would recommend using these to improve your experience!

### How to Install:
###
You can find documentation on how to install modpacks on multiple launchers [here](https://docs.modrinth.com/modpacks/play) (**Heads up**: some launchers will not support modpacks from modrinth and/or support importing vice versa)
### Promises:
###
- Debugging
- Note: PLEASE USE THE BETTERBEDS RESOURCEPACKS OR THE TEXTURES WILL BE BUGGED, k thx bye :)
- Semi-consistent updates 
### Q&A/Crucial Stuff:
###
- Q: Will this modpack support other loaders? A: **No, I intend to keep this as a fabric modpack.**
- Q: What Mods will be included? A: **Check the versions tab**
- Q: Where can I go if I find bugs or have recommendations? A: **Go to the Github Page**
- Q: Can I Share/Modify this modpack? A: **Feel free to share the modpack as long as it's downloaded from this page. You can of course modify the contents (Configs,Removing/Adding Mods), just don't sell it or something.**
### Special Thanks/Credits:
###
- Friends & Foes (Fabric) by Faboslav [https://modrinth.com/mod/friends-and-foes](https://modrinth.com/mod/friends-and-foes)
- Extra Alchemy by zabi94 [https://modrinth.com/mod/extraalchemy](https://modrinth.com/mod/extraalchemy)
